  1. Home
  2. rule
  3. Latin America
  4. Brazil

Brazil

How to Distinguish

  • The domain is .br
  • language is Portugal It is a word “Ã・ã” is distinctive.
  • the back of the sign black There are many things
  • The antenna on the house is distinctive.transparent There are many parabolic antennas.
  • The top of the license plate blue There are times when(by Geotips )
  • License plates of trucks, buses, and taxis red color
  • A partition in the groove of a utility pole be using telephone poles

Signs you can find

Representative Companies

    language is Portugal It is a word “Ã・ã” is distinctive.

    the back of the sign black There are many things (the background image ishereuse the one of, CC BY 3.0).

    The antenna on the house is distinctive.transparent Use a parabolic antenna.However, this alone cannot be certain.

    License plates of trucks, buses, and taxis It was red The characters are red It’s expensive.

    By Olympiobr - Own work, CC BY-SA 3.0, Wikimedia Commons

    It has the logo of Petrobras, the largest oil company in South America.(References Petrobras).

    There’s a tank with Fortlev written on it.(References Soluções Fortlev Caixa d’Água Pequenos Volumes).There are several different colors, but each has a unique shape.I can see it’s on the roof.

    Telephone poles in Brazil have partitions in the grooves.be.on the other handChileThere is a partition None There is only oneImage Source.You can also see circular utility poles.You can also see signs reading BR on the side of the road.

    A yellow chevron is found on a black background.

    As a country where chevrons of the same color can be foundCambodiaorPortugalThere is.Please note that in Cambodia and Thailand, the color of the soil and vegetation are similar in some places, so it is possible to make a mistake.

    By Agencia CNT de Noticias - Santa Catarina - SC-303 (ponto crítico), CC BY 2.0, Link

    Banco Itaú, the largest bank in South America orange sign There are many.to the gas station South America’s largest oil company Petrobras (green logo) There are many things.

    Narrow down state/region

    • You can narrow down the range by area code.
    • A signboard with the road number written as "BR XX" stands on the roadside.
    • Florianópoliscentered aroundAzoresYou can see European-style architecture influenced by immigrants from

      1 in Sao Paulo and 2 in Rio de Janeiro.Basically, the numbers increase from east to west.

      By Magno Brasil - Own work, CC BY-SA 4.0, Wikimedia Commons(Link)

      It’s quite difficult to find the road number right away, so try narrowing down the area based on the surrounding atmosphere.

      during constructionAzoresDue to the large number of Portuguese people who settled here, the majority of citizens have European immigrant ancestry.(References florianopolis).There are many German and Italian immigrants, and the architecture is often European-style.

      By dnsilva1, CC BY-SA 3.0, Link

      vegetation

      • Vegetation and soil colors vary by region.
        • Amazônia: humid equatorial climate with Amazonian forests
        • Cerrado: It is difficult to distinguish because there are areas with many fields and areas with many trees.
        • Mata Atlantica: a forest that stretches across more than 15 states along Brazil's Atlantic coastline
        • Caatinga: Dry soil, often containing whitish soil.
        • Pampa: It has an atmosphere similar to Uruguay and has agricultural and pastureland.
        • Pantanal: An alluvial plain formed by rivers in northern Paraguay, but there are almost no roads.
        Image source: By Brazil Travel, CC BY-SA 4.0, Wikimedia Commons

        Plants vary depending on the region.Affected by moist winds blowing from the sea.The forest looks different from other areas.I feel like sometimes I can see things like palms and pines.(References Ecology and conservation of the Brazilian Atlantic Forest (Mata Atlantica)).

        distinctive plants

        • Trees that identify specific regions or states
          • Parana pine: Parana pine(References Araucaria angustifolia)teeth paraná around the state(by neckoluv )
          • Brazilian wax palm:Cearer Northeastern region centered on the state
          • Babasu tree: Piauí state and Maranhão state(from 『[Geo Cup] Full tournament commentary by Japan's strongest!![Translation] [Geoguessr]』), can be seen all over the southern part of the country.

          This tree is paraná around the state(by neckoluv )

          By Tacarijus - own work, CC BY 2.5, Link

          This tree is Cearer around the state

          with the state of PiauíMaranhão state(from 『[Geo Cup] Full tournament commentary by Japan’s strongest!![Translation] [Geoguessr]』)It is found throughout the southern part of the country.

          By Photo by David J. Stang - source: David Stang. First published at ZipcodeZoo.com, CC BY-SA 4.0, Link

          Syagrus coronata is a tree that can be seen in eastern Brazil, distributed from the southern part of Pernambuco state to Bahia state.Probably a lot of Bahia.

          By Dick Culbert from Gibsons, B.C., Canada - Euterpe precatoria, CC BY 2.0, Link

          Açaizeiro is common in the state of Para.(by youtubeのコメント欄 citizen johnさん).It seems to be especially common in the Amazon River basin and around Marajó Island.(References Acai bowl specialty store EMPORIO EXPRESS Daikanyama).

          By Poyt448 Peter Woodard - own work, CC BY-SA 3.0, Link

          Sparsely distributed mainly in areas near the coast of Sao Paulo and Rio Grande do Sul states(References iNaturalist - Eucalyptus grandis).

          Narrow down city/town

          • Vila do Abraão has a distinctive mountain that shows the head of a trekker
          • There is a remote island called Fernando de Noronha.

            I can see a sharp mountain.There is also a section where you are riding a blue buggy..

            There is a hole in the telephone pole.There are many rocky areas and there are places where you can take a boat.There are some very distinctive rocks, so you might be able to tell from that..

            Original image source

            • Only the second telephone pole image from the left is extracted from the image below.
            • 　By Paul R. Burley - own work, CC BY-SA 4.0, Link

            Description of representative companies

            Company name code explanation settlement of accounts Dividend history
            Petroleo Brasileiro NASDAQ The largest oil drilling company in the southern hemisphere. Dividend History
            Vale NASDAQ One of the three major iron ore producers.It also produces bauxite, copper, and gold. Dividend History
            Itaú Unibanco Holding NASDAQ Largest bank in Latin America(References The world's 100 largest banks in the S&P Global Market Intelligence report).This is a rare company that pays a dividend every month (usually quarterly, but in South Africa and other countries semi-annually). Dividend History
